hooks.command: if grep -iqE 'co-authored-by:[[:space:]]*claude|generated with claude|🤖.*claude'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Bash command contains Claude/AI attribution. NEVER add Co-Authored-By Claude, Generated with Claude, or 🤖 markers to commits, PRs, tags or any repo content. Regla absoluta de Lucas."}}'; fi
